stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama Stuns No. 1 Texas 11-4 — Series Tied, Game 3 Today

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
UPSET ALERT: Alabama rallied to beat No. 1 Texas 11-4 on Friday night, evening their series 1-1 at Rhoads Stadium.

Game 3 is TODAY — 12:30 PM CT on SEC Network. Winner-take-all in Tuscaloosa.

#RollTide #HookEm

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Texas fell 11-4 to Alabama in Game 2. It's all tied up.

The rubber match is set: TODAY, 12:30 PM CT, SEC Network.

Which team takes the series? #SECSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells Hits HR No. 29 — One Away from NCAA Freshman Record

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
One. Home. Run.

Kendall Wells launched her 29th HR Friday, putting her just ONE away from tying the all-time NCAA freshman record.

Game 3 vs. Kentucky is TODAY at 11 AM CT at Love's Field. Record watch is on.

#BoomerSooner #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells at 29 HRs.

The NCAA all-time freshman record is 30 (Lauren Chamberlain).

She could tie it TODAY.

Could be one of the best moments in softball this season. #BoomerSooner

stories.title: **Headline:** FSU Win Streak Reaches 23 — Run-Rules Notre Dame 10-0

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
FSU run-ruled Notre Dame 10-0 in 5 innings — win streak now at 23 games.

Longest active streak in DI softball. Program's longest since 2018.

Torres HR No. 8. Harp HR No. 4. 10th shutout of the year.

#Noles #ACCSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Winner-Take-All: Texas vs. Alabama Game 3 — 12:30 PM CT on SEC Network

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
GAME 3 IS HERE.

No. 1 Texas vs. No. 4 Alabama — winner-take-all at Rhoads Stadium.

Moved up to 12:30 PM CT today due to weather. On SEC Network.

Don't miss it. #SECSoftball #HookEm #RollTide

stories.title: **Headline:** OU Can Sweep Kentucky Today — Wells HR #30 Watch Begins at Love's Field

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
OU leads the series 2-0 heading into Game 3.

Kendall Wells is one HR away from the NCAA freshman record. Love's Field. 11 AM CT today.

This could get historic. #BoomerSooner #SECSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Standings Snapshot — Texas/OU Tied at 10-1 After Friday

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
SEC softball standings after Friday:

Texas: 10-2 (lost Game 2 to Alabama)
Oklahoma: 10-1
Alabama: 8-3 (won Game 2 vs. Texas)

NFCA Week 9 poll drops Tuesday. Texas still No. 1 despite the loss? #SECSoftball

x_posts.text:

OU vs. KY Game 3 — 11 AM CT, Love's Field
